summary: A modern double bedroom in good decorative condition, featuring neutral emulsioned walls, grey carpet, and a large window looking onto an active construction site. The room is furnished with a double bed with a dark grey button-tufted headboard, white textured chest of drawers and matching bedside cabinets. Cleanliness is generally to a domestic standard, though the window glazing requires cleaning due to external construction dust, and some wall scuffs and a minor mattress tear are present.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Plastered ceiling, emulsioned in off-white/light grey, with recessed downlights and an AC ventilation grille.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Plastered walls, emulsioned in off-white/light grey.
defects: Minor rub marks to wall above headboard level
Scuff mark to wall at mid level
Light pencil-like scuff marks near portable radiator
Small circular brown stain at mid level to the right of the headboard

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: MDF skirting boards painted in white satin finish.
defects: Minor tiny paint nick to the top edge

items.name: Door and Frame
items.description: White painted modern flush internal door with a black lever handle and matching white painted frame.
defects: Faint grey mark to the bottom edge of door

items.name: Window and Frame
items.description: White UPVC double glazed window with a central opening section.
defects: Heavy construction dust and water spotting visible to external glazing

items.name: Window Blind
items.description: White roller blind with a silver metal ball chain mechanism.

items.name: Bed Frame and Headboard
items.description: Double bed divan base with drawers, upholstered in dark grey fabric, complete with a matching high rectangular button-tufted headboard.

items.name: Mattress
items.description: Manor Interiors double mattress, white fabric tufted with decorative leaf pattern.
defects: Faint circular yellowish stain on top surface
Small circular tear/hole to fabric on the side wall

items.name: Bedding
items.description: White cotton fitted sheet and duvet with white duvet cover.

items.name: Bedside Cabinets
items.description: Two-drawer white bedside units with faceted 3D geometric fronts, gold-colored drawer pulls, and gold-colored thin metal legs.

items.name: Chest of Drawers
items.description: Three-drawer white chest of drawers with faceted 3D geometric fronts, gold-colored handles, and gold-colored thin metal legs.

items.name: Bedside Lamps
items.description: Table lamps with rectangular cream fabric shades and open loop black metal bases.

items.name: Light Switches & Socket Plates
items.description: Chrome/dark nickel finish wall plates, including switches, sockets, and digital heating controls.
defects: Heavy fingerprint smudges and greasy marks to the single switch plate

items.name: Portable Radiator
items.description: Amazon Basics black portable oil-filled radiator with electric cord.

items.name: AC Vent Grille
items.description: Long horizontal slotted metal air conditioning grille painted in white to match wall.
